title: stachys arenaria subsp. mollis
intro: Stachys arenaria subsp. mollis, also known as Soft Betony, is a subspecies of the Stachys arenaria plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Soft Betony include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. Soft Betony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
